allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('id','?'\)[:8], x.get\('status','?'\), x.get\('meta',{}\).get\('commitHash','?'\)[:8] if isinstance\(x.get\('meta'\),dict\) else '?', x.get\('meta',{}\).get\('commitMessage',''\)[:60] if isinstance\(x.get\('meta'\),dict\) else ''\) for x in d[:5]]")

Bash(python -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env=d['\\''environments'\\'']['\\''edges'\\''][0]['\\''node'\\'']; svc=[s for s in env['\\''serviceInstances'\\'']['\\''edges'\\''] if s['\\''node'\\'']['\\''serviceName'\\'']=='\\''WORKER'\\''][0]['\\''node'\\'']; latest=svc['\\''latestDeployment'\\'']; print\('\\''latest deployment:'\\''\); print\('\\''  id:'\\'', latest['\\''id'\\'']\); print\('\\''  status:'\\'', latest['\\''status'\\'']\); print\('\\''  stopped:'\\'', latest.get\('\\''deploymentStopped'\\''\)\); print\('\\''  createdAt:'\\'', latest['\\''createdAt'\\'']\); print\('\\''  commit:'\\'', latest['\\''meta'\\'']['\\''commitHash'\\''][:8]\); print\(\); print\('\\''activeDeployments:'\\''\); *)

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const env=j.environments.edges[0].node; for\(const e of env.serviceInstances.edges\){const s=e.node; console.log\('SERVICE:', s.serviceName\); const l=s.latestDeployment; console.log\('  latest:', l.status, l.id, 'stopped=', l.deploymentStopped, 'commit=', l.meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\)\); for\(const a of \(s.activeDeployments||[]\)\){console.log\('  active:', a.status, a.id, 'commit=', a.meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\), 'created=', a.createdAt\);} console.log\(''\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/rwstatus.json','utf8'\)\); const env=j.environments.edges[0].node; for\(const e of env.serviceInstances.edges\){const s=e.node; console.log\('=== SERVICE:', s.serviceName, '==='\); const l=s.latestDeployment||{}; const meta=l.meta||{}; console.log\('  latest status :', l.status\); console.log\('  latest commit :', meta.commitHash?meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\):'\(none\)'\); console.log\('  stopped       :', l.deploymentStopped\); console.log\('  createdAt     :', l.createdAt\); console.log\(''\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/rwstatus2.json','utf8'\)\); const env=j.environments.edges[0].node; for\(const e of env.serviceInstances.edges\){const s=e.node; if\(s.serviceName!=='WORKER'\) continue; console.log\('=== SERVICE:', s.serviceName, '==='\); const l=s.latestDeployment||{}; const meta=l.meta||{}; console.log\('  latest status :', l.status\); console.log\('  latest commit :', meta.commitHash?meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\):'\(none\)'\); console.log\('  stopped       :', l.deploymentStopped\); console.log\('  createdAt     :', l.createdAt\); console.log\(''\); for\(const a of \(s.activeDeployments||[]\)\){console.log\('  active:', a.status, a.id.slice\(0,8\), 'commit=', a.meta.commitHash?a.meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\):'-', 'createdAt=', a.createdAt\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/rwstatus3.json','utf8'\)\); const env=j.environments.edges[0].node; for\(const e of env.serviceInstances.edges\){const s=e.node; if\(s.serviceName!=='WORKER'\) continue; console.log\('=== SERVICE:', s.serviceName, '==='\); const l=s.latestDeployment||{}; const meta=l.meta||{}; console.log\('  latest status :', l.status\); console.log\('  latest id     :', l.id?.slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('  stopped       :', l.deploymentStopped\); console.log\('  createdAt     :', l.createdAt\); console.log\(''\); console.log\('  active:'\); for\(const a of \(s.activeDeployments||[]\)\){console.log\('   ', a.status.padEnd\(10\), a.id.slice\(0,8\), 'commit=', a.meta.commitHash?a.meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\):'\(CLI\)', 'created=', a.createdAt\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/DELL/AppData/Local/Temp/rwstatus4.json','utf8'\)\); const env=j.environments.edges[0].node; for\(const e of env.serviceInstances.edges\){const s=e.node; if\(s.serviceName!=='WORKER'\) continue; console.log\('=== SERVICE:', s.serviceName, '==='\); console.log\('  active:'\); for\(const a of \(s.activeDeployments||[]\)\){console.log\('   ', a.status.padEnd\(12\), a.id.slice\(0,8\), 'commit=', a.meta.commitHash?a.meta.commitHash.slice\(0,8\):'\(CLI\)', 'createdAt=', a.createdAt\);}}")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); const dep={...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const tools=['knip','ts-prune','depcheck','ts-unused-exports','typescript','@biomejs/biome','eslint']; for\(const t of tools\){if\(dep[t]\) console.log\(t.padEnd\(25\), dep[t]\);} console.log\(''\); console.log\('scripts containing dead/unused/prune:'\); for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(p.scripts||{}\)\){if\(/dead|prune|unused|knip|cleanup/i.test\(k+' '+v\)\) console.log\('  ', k, '→', v\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('entry-ish scripts:'\); for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(p.scripts||{}\)\){console.log\('  ', k.padEnd\(20\), '→', v\);} console.log\(''\); console.log\('type:', p.type||'\(commonjs\)'\); console.log\('main:', p.main||'\(none\)'\); console.log\('module:', p.module||'\(none\)'\);}\);")

PowerShell(foreach \($id in 30584, 39056\) { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $id -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "PID=$\($p.Id\) Name=$\($p.ProcessName\) Started=$\($p.StartTime\)" } catch { Write-Output "PID=$id not found" } })
PowerShell(foreach \($id in 30584, 39056\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed $id" } catch { Write-Output "$id already gone" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2)

Bash(node -e "import\('mysql2/promise'\).then\(async m => { const t0=Date.now\(\); const c = await m.default.createConnection\({uri: process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); const [r] = await c.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM leads'\); const [o] = await c.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM orders'\); console.log\('leads:', r[0].n, 'orders:', o[0].n, '— '+\(Date.now\(\)-t0\)+'ms'\); await c.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); import\('mysql2/promise'\).then\(async m => { const t0=Date.now\(\); const c = await m.default.createConnection\({uri: process.env.DATABASE_URL}\); const [r] = await c.query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM leads'\); console.log\('leads:', r[0].n, '— '+\(Date.now\(\)-t0\)+'ms'\); await c.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\)\)\)")

PowerShell($p = Get-Process -Id 3780 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output "Found: $\($p.ProcessName\) PID=$\($p.Id\) started=$\($p.StartTime\)"; Stop-Process -Id 3780 -Force; Write-Output "Killed PID 3780" } else { Write-Output "PID 3780 not running" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -Unique OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Port 3000 still held by PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 is free" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "still held: $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 free now" })

Bash(node -e 'require\("dotenv/config"\);const m=require\("mysql2/promise"\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await m.createConnection\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\);const [r]=await c.query\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM `__drizzle_migrations`"\);console.log\("local applied:",r[0].c\);await c.end\(\);}\)\(\);')

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const m=require\('mysql2/promise'\); m.createConnection\({uri:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\).then\(async c=>{const [r]=await c.query\(\\"SELECT index_name, seq_in_index, column_name FROM information_schema.statistics WHERE table_schema=DATABASE\(\) AND table_name='orders' AND index_name='idx_orders_lead_user_attempts' ORDER BY seq_in_index\\"\); console.table\(r\); await c.end\(\);}\)")
